_comment: Module-id → canon mapping. The decorator fetches this once at page load. Schema: each entry has 'canon' (path to canon HTML) and optional 'bemPrefix' (when set, the decorator rewrites class placeholders __root/__suffix/--suffix to ${prefix}/${prefix}__suffix/${prefix}--suffix on the canon DOM before slot-fill). When a module-id is not in this map, the decorator falls back to /canon/modules/${moduleId}.html (no prefix rewrite) — this matches iter-003 behavior.
